ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hvac_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of air moved by the HVAC system (in cubic meters) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration the data was collected (in minutes) */,
  "mean_flowrate" REAL /* Mean flow rate of air (in cubic meters per second) */,
  "mean_temp_out" REAL /* Mean outdoor temperature (in Celsius) */,
  "mean_temp_in" REAL /* Mean indoor temperature (in Celsius) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of HVAC operation (e.g. hot, cold) */,
  "enthalpy" REAL /* Enthalpy of the air (in kJ/kg) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source used for the HVAC operation */,
  "humidity_out" REAL /* Outdoor humidity */,
  "humidity_in" REAL /* Indoor humidity */,
  "pressure_diff" REAL /* Pressure difference between indoor and outdoor */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption during the data collection period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hvac_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hvac_data_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for building management */,
  "building_area" REAL /* Total area of the building in square meters */,
  "building_height" REAL /* Height of the building in meters */,
  "number_of_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last building inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next building inspection */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, flowrate) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the building where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, facility manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building being monitored */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., view, adjust settings) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor involved in the monitoring action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, adjust settings, maintenance) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_logs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report is generated */,
  "total_energy_usage" REAL /* Total energy usage recorded in the report (in kWh) */,
  "average_temperature_in" REAL /* Average indoor temperature during the reporting period (in Celsius) */,
  "average_temperature_out" REAL /* Average outdoor temperature during the reporting period (in Celsius) */,
  "total_energy_cost" REAL /* Total cost of energy usage based on the energy source */,
  "energy_source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source used */,
  "energy_source_cost_per_kwh" REAL /* Cost per kilowatt-hour for the energy source */,
  "humidity_in" REAL /* Average indoor humidity during the reporting period */,
  "humidity_out" REAL /* Average outdoor humidity during the reporting period */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Average air quality index during the reporting period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reports_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where the alert occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., overheating, undercooling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where maintenance took place */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., calibration, filter replacement) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building using this energy source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., grid, solar, natural gas) */,
  "cost_per_kwh" REAL /* Cost per kilowatt-hour for this energy source */,
  "source_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the energy source in kilowatts */,
  "source_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the energy source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "source_installation_date" TEXT /* Date the energy source was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_sources_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)
